title: Finance Executive
description:
Finance Executive

About Us
The Singapore Table Tennis Association (STTA) is committed to maintaining a professional and high-performing organisational culture that upholds quality, accountability, and continuous improvement. We are inviting applications from suitably qualified and motivated individuals for the following position:

Position Title: Finance Executive

Reporting To: Finance & Corporate Services Manager

Key Responsibilities

Duties and Responsibilities

  • Process payments and billings, and maintain accurate accounting records in the General Ledger
  • Assist with the monthly closing of accounts in a timely and accurate manner
  • Prepare monthly audit schedules and supporting analyses
  • Perform monthly bank reconciliations and follow up on reconciling items
  • Prepare monthly GIRO payment control files and support timely and accurate GIRO collections
  • Review and verify cash advance settlements in accordance with internal guidelines
  • Maintain and update the Fixed Assets Register in accordance with organisational policies
  • Prepare and submit statutory and regulatory returns (e.g. Donations reporting, Department of Statistics, and other relevant submissions)
  • Assist with year-end financial closing and external audit processes
  • Ensure accruals and balance sheet items are properly monitored, documented, and reflected in audit schedules
  • Uphold sound corporate governance practices and internal controls in the execution of daily finance operations
  • Assist with the review and implementation of organisational policies, including Finance and IT policies
  • Support the preparation, consolidation, and reporting of the Annual Report
  • Assist in budgeting, forecasting, and financial analysis activities
  • Participate in the testing, implementation, and enhancement of systems and applications

Other Duties

  • Undertake additional duties as assigned, in support of organisational objectives

Job Requirements

  • Diploma, GCE ‘A’ Level, or Degree in a relevant discipline
  • Entry-level candidates are welcome to apply; prior relevant experience will be an advantage
  • 1–2 years of relevant accounting or finance experience is preferred but not mandatory
  • Familiarity with accounting systems and Microsoft Office applications
  • Able to work independently, as well as collaboratively in a team environment
  • Demonstrates a positive, professional, and service-oriented attitude
  • Ability to work effectively in a structured yet dynamic environment
  • Good verbal and written communication skills, with strong attention to detail
  • Proficiency in English and Mandarin (required to liaise with Mandarin-speaking stakeholders)

Why Join Us?

  • Be part of a mission-driven organization
  • Collaborative and friendly work environment
  • Opportunities for professional development
  • Contribute to impactful community-oriented initiatives

Position Type

Full-time | 2-Year Renewable Contract

Salary will commensurate with qualification and experience. 

Application Instructions:
Interested applicants are invited to submit a detailed resume stating current and expected salary, and earliest start date. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

postedCompany.description:
Singapore Table Tennis Association (STTA) is a National Sports Association affiliated to the Singapore National Olympic Council and Sport Singapore.
 
Our mission is to develop world class table tennis players by identifying, nurturing and motivating aspiring table tennis talents to become the best that they could be.
 
The STTA is also committed to promoting table tennis vigorously by building a significant number of table tennis players to help make a vibrant sporting Singapore
